featured.title: X-K16C PRO turns rigging height into a moving beam effect.
featured.text: Designed for high-impact stages, the X-K16C PRO combines a circular beam fixture, kinetic lifting movement and DMX512 / MADRIX control to create repeatable visual moments for touring, clubs and large events.

applications.title: Made for buyers who need reliable show effects.

trust.text: Since 2014, XLIGHTING has grown into a professional 30+ person stage lighting team, supporting rental companies, integrators and production teams with kinetic lighting products, customization and project support from China.

items.question: What is a kinetic lighting system?
items.answer: A kinetic lighting system combines motorized winches, suspended light objects and DMX control so lights can move vertically or rhythmically during a show.

items.question: Can XLIGHTING customize kinetic lights for a project?
items.answer: Yes. XLIGHTING supports OEM/ODM customization for kinetic balls, tubes, winch systems and stage lighting effects based on venue, rigging height and control requirements.

items.question: Which buyers are best suited for XLWINCH systems?
items.answer: Rental companies, event production teams, system integrators, theaters, churches, clubs, theme parks and lighting designers can use XLWINCH systems for dynamic stage and installation effects.

inquiry.title: Tell us what you want to move, light and control.
